name: claude-trio
description: Three-model Bedrock team: Opus (architect/lead), Sonnet (builder), Haiku (fast tasks). Spawn full team or individual panes as needed.
notes: Opus: complex reasoning, architecture, deep review. Full tool set.
Sonnet: implementation, code generation, standard tasks. Code tools only.
Haiku: fast/cheap tasks, quick lookups, formatting, summaries. Read-only + rg.
PI_WORKER=1 suppresses handoff injection on spawn.
tools list maps to pi --tools flag; adjust per task before spawning.
